summary: Completed comprehensive testing of D'CLIC Boost Section and Coffre-Fort features. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified D'CLIC Boost Section with 4 dimension cards (ENFJ, Influence, Social, Empathie), expand/collapse toggle, competences display. Coffre-Fort file upload/download with real Emergent Object Storage working. Both beneficiary (bob23) and partner (cluximon@gmail.com) login flows successful.
critical_code_review_comments: D'CLIC Boost Section properly renders 4 dimension cards when dclic_imported=True
Dimension cards show correct values: ENFJ (MBTI), Influence (DISC), Social (RIASEC), Empathie (Vertu dominante)
Expand/collapse toggle reveals competences fortes and skills importés
Coffre-Fort upload endpoint correctly stores files in Emergent Object Storage
Coffre-Fort download endpoint retrieves files with proper Content-Disposition header
Document cards show 'Fichier' badge when storage_path exists
File upload dialog has proper file upload area with drag-and-drop support
Auto-add CV to coffre-fort implemented in cv.py routes (lines 681-715 for uploaded CV, lines 828-875 for generated CVs)
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Used existing bob23 user with dclic_imported=True and D'CLIC profile data. Test CV document already in coffre-fort.
context_for_next_testing_agent: D'CLIC Boost Section and Coffre-Fort features fully tested. Key findings: 1) bob23 user has dclic_imported=True with MBTI=ENFJ, DISC=Influence, RIASEC=Social, Vertu=Empathie. 2) D'CLIC Boost Section shows 4 dimension cards with gradient colors. 3) Expand toggle reveals competences fortes (Communication interpersonnelle, Leadership collaboratif, etc.) and skills importés. 4) Coffre-Fort has 1 document 'Test CV' with file badge and download button. 5) File upload uses Emergent Object Storage (storage.py). 6) Auto-add to coffre-fort implemented in cv.py for both uploaded and AI-generated CVs.

backend_apis: GET /api/profile returns dclic_imported, dclic_mbti, dclic_disc_label, dclic_riasec_major, dclic_vertu_dominante ✓
